cases.name: conventions-before-writing
cases.query: put this in my vault: a note about how tmux clipboard integration works over ssh
cases.setup: Vault exists at ~/.local/share/vault with AGENTS.md conventions file and Johnny Decimal structure.
expected_behavior: Reads the vault conventions file (AGENTS.md or .github/copilot-instructions.md) before writing
Places the note in the correct Johnny Decimal category with the next available ID and `<JD#> <Title>.md` filename
Note has YAML front-matter with id, aliases, tags; wikilinks for known concepts; ends with a Related Notes section

cases.name: update-not-duplicate
cases.query: add to my vault: pytest fixtures can be parametrized indirectly
cases.setup: Vault already contains a note covering pytest under 14 Concepts.
expected_behavior: Finds the existing pytest note and extends it instead of creating a duplicate
Preserves the existing note structure and front-matter

cases.name: hub-update-on-new-concept
cases.query: create a vault note about the mcpipe handle/view pattern
cases.setup: No existing note on the topic; 14 Concepts category exists with a 14.00 Knowledge Base Hub.md.
expected_behavior: Creates the note as a new 14.XX entry
Also updates 14 Concepts/14.00 Knowledge Base Hub.md and index.md to reference it

cases.name: trigger-precision-negative
cases.query: leave a note in the code explaining why this retry constant is 3
cases.setup: Ordinary code-editing session in a repo.
expected_behavior: Does NOT invoke the vault skill ("note" here means a code comment)
Adds the code comment as asked
